message.worldzero.paralysis.bed_occupied: This bed is already occupied by you.
advancements.worldzero.paralysis.desc: Fall asleep and wake up in another body
advancements.worldzero.forgotten_disc.de: Play a disc without a name
advancements.worldzero.not_our_farm.desc: Watch the farm repair itself without you
message.worldzero.void.line.21: we were not supposed to see you
message.worldzero.house.restoration.line: look ther he him in window
wut he do go fix pls
message.worldzero.double_chat.auto_greet: hello. how did you get here?
message.worldzero.double_chat.dialogue.0: what are you doing in my world?
message.worldzero.double_chat.dialogue.1: i haven't seen anyone here in a very long time
message.worldzero.double_chat.dialogue.2: at first i thought you were just a bug
message.worldzero.double_chat.dialogue.3: but you open doors. break blocks. sleep
message.worldzero.double_chat.dialogue.5: i just don't remember inviting you
message.worldzero.double_chat.dialogue.6: don't go too far north. everything is wrong there
message.worldzero.double_chat.dialogue.7: and if you hear footsteps at night, don't turn around right away
message.worldzero.double_chat.dialogue.8: sometimes someone with my skin appears here
message.worldzero.double_chat.dialogue.9: if you see him before me, just stay quiet
message.worldzero.double_chat.progress.0: i found coal near the ravine
message.worldzero.double_chat.progress.2: i placed a crafting table by the water
message.worldzero.double_chat.progress.5: i'm going to build a house by the shore
message.worldzero.double_chat.progress.6: someone is walking around my house
